title: Racists Recessions And Revolutions
description: "Democracy isn't power to the people - it's power to the story. And why let the truth get in the way of a good story?" Nadica has it all; a Balkan Mum from a country everyone seems to think shouldn't exist, a British dad who's never around and a post-uni life timed perfectly to be cancelled by Covid. What more could a girl ask for? Well a bit of cash wouldn't hurt. With the rest of her life in ruins, one Lockdown hustle beckons like a siren's call; lying online, for fun and for profit. Join Nadica as she masterminds some of the Internet's most viral headlines: Could Covid Be A Lie? Was The Election Stolen? And What Really Went Down In That Prison Cell... As her work takes her from the ideological fringes and into the halls of power, truth and lies blend and bash and the combined powers of Racists, Recessions and Revolutions roll together to destabilise the very fabric of society as we know it - no spoilers, but we all knew it would happen eventually right?
